home.subtitle: Point your camera at the details that make a place worth remembering.
home.insight: A city becomes legible when you slow down enough to notice its smallest choices.

settings.title: Settings
settings.highResDesc: Show a browser read-aloud button in results
settings.locationEnabledDesc: Enabled by default; precise location improves landmark matching
settings.aiDescription: Qwen vision · DeepSeek text · optional Gemini fallback

history.pendingHint: Your image stays on this device until you retry
history.journalFailed: The journal could not be created

map.title: Discovery map
map.empty: No location data yet. The map is showing a global view.

crop.hint: Drag the frame or its corners

scan.failureHint: Try again or choose a different photo.

errors.invalidImage: This image could not be opened
errors.cameraHelp: Allow camera access in your browser, or choose a photo instead.
errors.offlineRetry: You are offline. Retry after reconnecting.

errors.rateLimited: The service is busy. Try again shortly.
errors.saveFailed: The image could not be saved
